channel.title: Vault
channel.generator: Webpage HTML Export plugin for Obsidian

item.title: Welcome
item.description:
This is your new vault.Make a note of something, create a link, or try the Importer!When you're ready, delete this note and make the vault your own.
Hot_Lizard Music_Video Process

item.title: Mixing and sound design
item.description: BreakcoreUsually add a low pass filter to break beats, even if its slight, to not overpower the main drums and be a background asset, extra percussion.Waveshaper is really awesome for a lot of things, it is good for both distortion and general amplification. It plays well together with effects like bitcrush.

item.title: 3D animation Vs 2D animation
item.description: 3D animation is Geometrically perfect which is why it is easier to tell something is 3DA technique to make 2D look 3D is rotoscoping There are many techniques for making 3D look 2D

item.title: Learning ressource-ing clusterfuck
item.description: Wavedash, Waveland, Tecking, Wave cancellingWhat are they, How can they work in 3D A Wave Dash is a physics engine exploit achieved by executing a short hop immediately followed by a dash. It manipulates the game's movement calculations, forcing arcing traversal rather than a standard straight dash. It grants massive speeds and range, making it crucial for competitive mobility.Arcs are a very important principle in animation. Wave dashes should be an integral part of the game, easy and comfortable to perform with animations specifically made for the mechanic.Tecking walls and surfaces in Platform fighters is the act of using the environment for the players advantageWhen a character interacts with a surface (a wall, ceiling, floor, or corner), the game registers a specific collision state. A skilled player can use this interaction to control how a character's velocity and trajectory change upon impact.Tecking involves:Wall Jumps/Wall Kicks: Instead of running into a wall, the player initiates an impulse force away from it by jumping or attacking while touching the surface. This allows rapid propulsion upward (Wall Jump) or sideways (Wall Kick). For example, launching diagonally off a vertical wall bypasses opponents positioned directly in front.Edge Guarding/Surface Trapping: The player forces the opponent into a specific position relative to a surface—often at an edge or corner—and then dictates their fate by moving along that surface. By outpacing the trapped opponent (e.g., running along a ceiling), the attacker can initiate a ledge grab or force them into a disadvantageous spot.Every interaction serves a strategic purpose:When hit or knocked back, a player can "teck" themselves into a corner or against a wall to stabilize their trajectory, preventing them from being immediately pushed off the stage (a process known as recovery). They use the surface's resistance to arrest unwanted movement.Wavelanding is similar to/the same as wavedashing with one key differenceThe idea of wavelanding is to wavedash into the ground in the fastest way for an easy and quick follow up attack on the ground.Wave cancelling is the act of cancelling a wavedash

item.title: Kemuri
item.description: Monster hunter like Multiplayer Yokai hunting game with Director of BayonettaIt has an awesome aesthetic and world. The yokai can be slain and used as abillitys wich is visualized by fashionable clothing

item.title: No Rest For The Wicked
item.description: Ori and the blindforest Moonlight developers Action Rpg

item.title: Hot_Lizard Music_Video Process
item.description:
This page is a full documentation on the process of how this fanmade project came to exist.Concept/Made up Reference for the Brain SceneAnother reference image in use
Remove/add more realism than there was before.It is composed of multiple components. Starting with the principled BSDF for most realism and detail and slowly stripped of everything unnecessary through the adage of extra nodes and shader layers, for stylization purposes. Inspiration came from this videoThe point currently is to have a stylized blobby wet brain that has the style of can be deduced to be made by or have a relation to AI technologys.What this specifically is, is the sludge that the brain turns into (can be referenced towards and interpreted in the song). Because the end result of AI Image and video generation is a design that devolves into, functions as and or somewhat looks like sludge. In other words "Slop".Its a combination of everything, turning it into a vicious liquid metaphorically. Added Subsurface Scattering for extra Realism. Shader Node Setup rendered result:Without Subsurface Scattering
With Subsurface Scattering
A result looking more like the initial concept:
Shader Node setup currently in use
Beginning of modeling out the main scene the music video will take place in
Searching on House listing sites for apartment and what low income apartments look like was a great reference point to start getting the look right in future development.Downloaded a Potentially placeholder computer model from sketchfab and modified it.

Info "Personal Computer" (https://skfb.ly/6YEDU) by Juan Foo is licensed under Creative Commons Attribution (http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/). Modeled out the first window.
Two Bevels were used. One bevel for the hinge and another one to add a little more detail and curvature to the inner frame.Current state of the Scene
